# Hesed — a private investment holding company

Hesed is a private investment holding company based in Boulder, Colorado. The name "hesed" comes from the Hebrew word חֶסֶד, meaning loving-kindness — a steadfast, covenantal kind of love, measured in what you actually do for another person.

## Holdings

- Pipestaff (software) — performance-based caregiver lead generation for home care agencies: https://pipestaff.com
- Colorado CareAssist (services) — licensed Colorado home care agency (License #04Y296): https://coloradocareassist.com

## Giving

- Hesed Foundation — separate philanthropy built on the same idea: http://www.hesedfoundation.org/

## Contact

- Phone: (303) 757-1777
- Address: 1911 11th St, Fl 2, Boulder, CO 80302
